channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Trump Warns Mideast Truce On "Life Support", Iran Says Ready For Any Aggression

media:content.media:description: "The ceasefire is on massive life support", Donald Trump said.

item.description: Iran War: After slamming the reply as "TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE", Trump insisted the United States would see a "complete victory" over Iran.
item.content:encoded: Iran War: After slamming the reply as "TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE", Trump insisted the United States would see a "complete victory" over Iran.

item.title: Why West Asia Conflict Is A Major Test For India's Diplomacy

media:content.media:description: India's moves were carefully calibrated because its interests in the region are sensitive

item.description: The conflict involving Iran, Israel and several Gulf nations has once again put the spotlight on New Delhi's strategy of maintaining ties with multiple global powers at the same time
item.content:encoded: The conflict involving Iran, Israel and several Gulf nations has once again put the spotlight on New Delhi's strategy of maintaining ties with multiple global powers at the same time

item.title: Global Energy Shock From Iran War May Extend Till 2027: Saudi Aramco Chief

media:content.media:description: Crude prices jumped during the first quarter from the mid $60s in early February to over $100 a barrel.

item.description: A day earlier, Aramco had announced a net profit rise of more than 25 per cent in the first quarter of 2026 compared to the same period last year, fuelled by higher oil prices as exports remain blocked in the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: A day earlier, Aramco had announced a net profit rise of more than 25 per cent in the first quarter of 2026 compared to the same period last year, fuelled by higher oil prices as exports remain blocked in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Trump Says Will Discuss US Arms Sales To Taiwan With Xi During China Trip

media:content.media:description: Trump, after referencing Russia's invasion of Ukraine, said of Taiwan, "I don't think it'll happen."

item.description: The United States recognises only Beijing but under domestic law is required to provide weapons to Taiwan so that it can defend itself.
item.content:encoded: The United States recognises only Beijing but under domestic law is required to provide weapons to Taiwan so that it can defend itself.

item.title: Trump Plans US Gas Tax Cut As Iran War Spurs Price Surge

media:content.media:description: Suspending the federal fuel tax would bring those prices down by about four per cent.

item.description: US federal taxes on gasoline amount to 18.4 cents per gallon on gasoline and 24.4 cents per gallon for diesel, according to the US Energy Information Administration (EIA).
item.content:encoded: US federal taxes on gasoline amount to 18.4 cents per gallon on gasoline and 24.4 cents per gallon for diesel, according to the US Energy Information Administration (EIA).

item.title: 'Iran Ceasefire On Life Support': Trump After Dismissing Tehran's Proposal

media:content.media:description: Trump also claimed Iran is willing to give the United States "the nuclear dust". (File)

item.description: Trump's swift rejection of Iran's response on Sunday has fueled concerns that shipping through Strait of Hormuz will continue to be hampered.
item.content:encoded: Trump's swift rejection of Iran's response on Sunday has fueled concerns that shipping through Strait of Hormuz will continue to be hampered.

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire On "Massive Life Support"
item.description: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships
item.content:encoded: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships

item.title: Man Who Tried To Shoot Trump At White House Press Dinner Pleads Not Guilty

media:content.media:description: Trump has traditionally boycotted the dinner but decided to attend this year.

item.description: Cole Allen, 31, entered a not guilty plea during an appearance in a federal district court in the nation's capital, The Hill and other outlets said.
item.content:encoded: Cole Allen, 31, entered a not guilty plea during an appearance in a federal district court in the nation's capital, The Hill and other outlets said.

item.title: Elon Musk, Tim Cook To Be Part Of Team Trump For Key China Tour: Report

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump will make a state to China visit from May 13 to 15.

item.description: The group of more than a dozen top executives is joining Trump for a visit the US president hopes will unlock a series of business deals with Beijing.
item.content:encoded: The group of more than a dozen top executives is joining Trump for a visit the US president hopes will unlock a series of business deals with Beijing.

item.title: "Extremisms Carry Consequences": EU Sanctions Israeli Settlers In West Bank

media:content.media:description: The occupied West Bank has been gripped by almost daily violence involving Israeli troops and settlers.

item.description: The move in response to rising settlement expansion in Israeli-occupied West Bank had been stalled by Hungary's former prime minister Viktor Orban.
item.content:encoded: The move in response to rising settlement expansion in Israeli-occupied West Bank had been stalled by Hungary's former prime minister Viktor Orban.

item.title: From Banker To PM: How This Tycoon Became America's Pick For Iraq

media:content.media:description: Zaidi founded Al Janoob Islamic Bank roughly a decade ago.

item.description: US President Donald Trump has invited Zaidi to Washington and declared that Washington "is with him all the way."
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump has invited Zaidi to Washington and declared that Washington "is with him all the way."

item.title: Iran War, Oil Sanction, Energy: What Trump And Xi May Focus On During Talks

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping this week. (File)

item.description: Talks on the Iran war may dominate the May 14 to 15 summit between US President Donald Trump and his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping in Beijing.
item.content:encoded: Talks on the Iran war may dominate the May 14 to 15 summit between US President Donald Trump and his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping in Beijing.

item.title: WHO Confirms 7 Cases Of Hantavirus On Cruise Ship

media:content.media:description: In total, three people have died in the hantavirus outbreak, the WHO said.

item.description: The tally was updated after France reported that a French passenger evacuated from the MV Hondius had tested positive for the virus.
item.content:encoded: The tally was updated after France reported that a French passenger evacuated from the MV Hondius had tested positive for the virus.

item.title: US Teacher, 25, Accused Of Sexually Assaulting Student In Classroom Closet, Vehicle

media:content.media:description: Nichols' profile has since been removed from the school's website.

item.description: The disturbing phenomenon of teachers engaging in illegal sexual relationships with students is a growing concern in the United States.
item.content:encoded: The disturbing phenomenon of teachers engaging in illegal sexual relationships with students is a growing concern in the United States.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | 'Hellish Difficulty': Why India Should Be Keeping An Eye On China's New 'Shipborne' Drone
item.description: The GJ-21, which has a reported combat attack radius of up to 1,500 kilometres, when combined with a land-attack long-range precision-strike system, can have the ability to strike deep within a territory's mainland.
item.content:encoded: The GJ-21, which has a reported combat attack radius of up to 1,500 kilometres, when combined with a land-attack long-range precision-strike system, can have the ability to strike deep within a territory's mainland.

item.title: Quest For Rare Bird, Landfill Visit: How 'Patient Zero' Caught Hantavirus

media:content.media:description: 70-year-old Leo Schilperoord has been identified as 'patient zero'.

item.description: The ornithologists decided to visit a landfill four miles outside of Ushuaia, considered a pilgrimage point for birdwatchers, later thought to be the place where they contracted hantavirus.
item.content:encoded: The ornithologists decided to visit a landfill four miles outside of Ushuaia, considered a pilgrimage point for birdwatchers, later thought to be the place where they contracted hantavirus.

item.title: Israel's Iron Dome Intercepted 99% Missiles From Iran, Hamas And Hezbollah

media:content.media:description: The Iron Dome has allegedly knocked out most missiles from Iran. (File)

item.description: Iran has fired about 1,500 ballistic missiles at Israel in two rounds of fighting since 2024, the chairman of Rafael Advanced Defense Systems said.
item.content:encoded: Iran has fired about 1,500 ballistic missiles at Israel in two rounds of fighting since 2024, the chairman of Rafael Advanced Defense Systems said.

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak 2026: List Of Confirmed Cases By Nationality
item.description: Here is a roundup of which countries have confirmed or probable cases of nationals infected by hantavirus after the outbreak on the cruise ship MV Hondius...
item.content:encoded: Here is a roundup of which countries have confirmed or probable cases of nationals infected by hantavirus after the outbreak on the cruise ship MV Hondius...

item.title: Hantavirus vs Norovirus: Which Viral Infection Is Deadlier?

media:content.media:description: Norovirus is a highly contagious virus

item.description: Norovirus is a highly contagious virus that causes gastroenteritis, an inflammation of the stomach and intestines. It spreads primarily through contaminated food or water, surfaces, and close contact with infected individuals.
item.content:encoded: Norovirus is a highly contagious virus that causes gastroenteritis, an inflammation of the stomach and intestines. It spreads primarily through contaminated food or water, surfaces, and close contact with infected individuals.

item.title: A Year After Op Sindoor, Pak Army Chief's Unprovoked Threat To India

media:content.media:description: Munir claimed that the conflict between the two nuclear powers "was not merely a traditional war"

item.description: Reiterating his warning, Munir said that if "Pakistan's enemies" undertook any such move in the future, the effects of war would not remain limited.
item.content:encoded: Reiterating his warning, Munir said that if "Pakistan's enemies" undertook any such move in the future, the effects of war would not remain limited.
